title: Croatian Berry Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring a mix of berries topped with a crunchy crumble mixture.

ingredients.name: Mixed Berries
ingredients.notes: such as blueberries, strawberries and raspberries

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the berries and granulated sugar.
In a separate bowl, combine the all-purpose flour and cold unsalted butter until crumbly.
Add the Tangy Croatian Cheese Crumble to the flour mixture and stir until combined.
Transfer the berry mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Top the berries with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
